_README: This file defines the candidate onboarding form. Edit it to add, remove, reword, or reorder questions WITHOUT touching any code.
After editing, the change is live on the next page reload — no rebuild, no restart.
TOP LEVEL:
steps[]   ordered list of steps shown in the wizard
STEP:
key       internal id (do not change once a question has answers in the DB)
title     header shown to the candidate
subtitle  optional small text under the title
questions[]   list of questions on this step
QUESTION:
key       maps to a column on CandidateProfile (or to onboardingData JSON for legacy free-text fields)
label     the text the candidate sees
help      optional gray helper text under the input
required  true | false
type      one of:
text          single-line text input
textarea      multi-line text input
number        numeric input
select        dropdown — needs `options`
radio         radio buttons — needs `options`
checkboxes    multi-select boxes — needs `options`
boolean       single checkbox
role-picker   pick one role from the JobRole taxonomy
role-multi    pick many roles from JobRole
skill-multi   pick many skills from Skill
industry-multi  pick many industries from Industry
salary-range  min/max/currency triple input
languages     list of {language, level} entries
city-country  paired city + country inputs
options[] for select/radio/checkboxes — array of strings OR {value,label} objects
visibleIf optional condition: { key: 'otherQuestionKey', equals: 'value' } — hides until matched
placeholder optional placeholder text

questions.label: Your current role
questions.help: Pick the closest match from the dropdown — you can refine later.

questions.label: Your skills
questions.help: Add as many as apply. Start typing to search.

questions.label: Target roles
questions.help: Roles you'd like to be considered for.

questions.label: Cities you'd relocate to
questions.help: Comma-separated. Leave blank if open to anywhere.

questions.label: Languages you speak
questions.help: Add each language and your level (A1–C2 or Native).
